title: Supabase & PostgreSQL Backend Specification
description: Especificação arquitetural completa do banco de dados relacional com suporte a buscas espaciais PostGIS, Políticas de Segurança de Nível de Linha (RLS), Armazenamento de Arquivos e triggers para sincronização futura do aplicativo ClassiTrade.

extensions.name: postgis
extensions.purpose: Suporte a tipos espaciais e consultas geográficas (latitude/longitude e proximidade)

tables.name: profiles
tables.description: Tabela de usuários sincronizada automaticamente com o Supabase Auth
tables.sql:
CREATE TABLE public.profiles (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  avatar_url TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);

tables.name: ads
tables.description: Anúncios cadastrados com campos geográficos PostGIS
tables.sql:
CREATE TABLE public.ads (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (char_length(title) >= 3),
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  category TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (category IN ('Eletrônicos', 'Moda', 'Esportes', 'Casa', 'Livros')),
  images TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  exchange_accept TEXT NOT NULL,
  latitude DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
  longitude DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
  geog GEOGRAPHY(Point, 4326) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);

-- Índice espacial GIST para buscas geográficas rápidas
CREATE INDEX ads_geog_idx ON public.ads USING GIST (geog);

tables.name: questions
tables.description: Perguntas públicas e respostas do vendedor sobre o anúncio
tables.sql:
CREATE TABLE public.questions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  ad_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.ads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  content TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (char_length(content) >= 2),
  answer TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);

tables.name: offers
tables.description: Propostas privadas de trocas ligando um anúncio próprio ou customizado
tables.sql:
CREATE TABLE public.offers (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  ad_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.ads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  sender_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  receiver_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'rejected')),
  linked_ad_id UUID REFERENCES public.ads(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  custom_item_title TEXT,
  custom_item_description TEXT,
  custom_item_images TEXT[],
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT chk_offer_items CHECK (
    (linked_ad_id IS NOT NULL AND custom_item_title IS NULL AND custom_item_description IS NULL) OR
    (linked_ad_id IS NULL AND custom_item_title IS NOT NULL AND custom_item_description IS NOT NULL)
  )
);

tables.name: messages
tables.description: Mensagens de chat privado dentro de uma proposta de troca ativa
tables.sql:
CREATE TABLE public.messages (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  offer_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.offers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  sender_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);

geospatial_functions.name: get_nearby_ads
geospatial_functions.description: Função RPC para buscar anúncios filtrados e ordenados por proximidade
geospatial_functions.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_nearby_ads(
  user_lat DOUBLE PRECISION,
  user_lng DOUBLE PRECISION,
  category_filter TEXT DEFAULT 'Todos',
  search_query TEXT DEFAULT ''
)
RETURNS TABLE (
  id UUID,
  user_id UUID,
  title TEXT,
  description TEXT,
  category TEXT,
  images TEXT[],
  exchange_accept TEXT,
  latitude DOUBLE PRECISION,
  longitude DOUBLE PRECISION,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  distance_km DOUBLE PRECISION,
  user_name TEXT,
  user_avatar TEXT,
  user_score BIGINT
) AS $$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT 
    a.id,
    a.user_id,
    a.title,
    a.description,
    a.category,
    a.images,
    a.exchange_accept,
    a.latitude,
    a.longitude,
    a.created_at,
    ST_Distance(a.geog, ST_MakePoint(user_lng, user_lat)::geography) / 1000.0 AS distance_km,
    p.name AS user_name,
    p.avatar_url AS user_avatar,
    COALESCE(v.score, 0)::BIGINT AS user_score
  FROM public.ads a
  JOIN public.profiles p ON a.user_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN public.v_user_scores v ON p.id = v.user_id
  WHERE 
    (category_filter = 'Todos' OR a.category = category_filter)
    AND (
      search_query = '' 
      OR a.title ILIKE '%' || search_query || '%'
      OR a.description ILIKE '%' || search_query || '%'
      OR a.exchange_accept ILIKE '%' || search_query || '%'
    )
  ORDER BY distance_km ASC;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

triggers_and_views.name: ads_set_geog_trigger
triggers_and_views.description: Garante que o ponto geográfico 'geog' seja sempre calculado a partir da lat/lng ao inserir/atualizar

triggers_and_views.name: profiles_sync_auth_trigger
triggers_and_views.description: Cria um perfil público automaticamente ao registrar um novo e-mail no Supabase Auth

triggers_and_views.name: v_user_scores
triggers_and_views.description: View que calcula dinamicamente o score de confiança do usuário: Score = (Trocas Finalizadas * 10) + (Mensagens Enviadas * 1)
triggers_and_views.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.v_user_scores AS
SELECT 
  p.id AS user_id,
  (
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.offers o WHERE o.status = 'accepted' AND (o.sender_id = p.id OR o.receiver_id = p.id)) * 10 +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.messages m WHERE m.sender_id = p.id) * 1
  ) AS score
FROM public.profiles p;

profiles: ALTER TABLE public.profiles ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Perfis públicos visíveis para todos" ON public.profiles FOR SELECT USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Usuários editam apenas seu próprio perfil" ON public.profiles FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = id);
ads: ALTER TABLE public.ads ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Anúncios visíveis publicamente" ON public.ads FOR SELECT USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Usuários logados criam anúncios" ON public.ads FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
CREATE POLICY "Usuários editam seus próprios anúncios" ON public.ads FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
CREATE POLICY "Usuários excluem seus próprios anúncios" ON public.ads FOR DELETE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
questions: ALTER TABLE public.questions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Perguntas visíveis publicamente" ON public.questions FOR SELECT USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Qualquer usuário logado pergunta" ON public.questions FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
CREATE POLICY "Vendedor do anúncio responde à pergunta" ON public.questions FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = (SELECT user_id FROM public.ads WHERE id = ad_id));
offers: ALTER TABLE public.offers ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Ofertas visíveis apenas para os envolvidos" ON public.offers FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = sender_id OR auth.uid() = receiver_id);
CREATE POLICY "Qualquer usuário cria proposta de troca" ON public.offers FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = sender_id);
CREATE POLICY "Envolvidos na troca atualizam status" ON public.offers FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = sender_id OR auth.uid() = receiver_id);
messages: ALTER TABLE public.messages ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

buckets.name: ad-images
policies: CREATE POLICY "Fotos públicas para leitura" ON storage.objects FOR SELECT USING (bucket_id = 'ad-images');
CREATE POLICY "Usuários autenticados enviam fotos" ON storage.objects FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (bucket_id = 'ad-images' AND auth.role() = 'authenticated');
CREATE POLICY "Usuário gerencia suas próprias fotos" ON storage.objects FOR DELETE USING (bucket_id = 'ad-images' AND owner = auth.uid());

buckets.name: user-avatars
policies: CREATE POLICY "Avatares públicos para leitura" ON storage.objects FOR SELECT USING (bucket_id = 'user-avatars');
CREATE POLICY "Usuários enviam seu próprio avatar" ON storage.objects FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (bucket_id = 'user-avatars' AND auth.uid()::text = (storage.foldername(name))[1]);
